name: Bunting
description: Strings of party pennants swaying from their lines — every redraw recolors the flags and sends a breeze through them.

code.style: --flag: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --sway: @rand(-14deg, 14deg); --rule: ( :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -2%; right: -2%; top: 6%; height: 1.4%; background: var(--color5); opacity: 0.7; transition: ease 500ms; } @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 27%; top: 7%; width: 46%; height: 60%; background: var(--flag); clip-path: polygon(0% 0%, 100% 0%, 50% 100%); transform: rotate(var(--sway)); transform-origin: 50% 0%; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
